title: Set 8: A Trip to the Desert 🐪
instructions_en: READ THE STORY. CHOOSE A WORD FROM THE BOX. WRITE THE CORRECT WORD NEXT TO NUMBERS 1–6. THERE IS ONE EXAMPLE.
story_segments: Last winter, my family went to Egypt. The weather was very hot and
. I had my first ride on a

at first because I was so high up, but Leo was very kind.

We traveled across the deep yellow
for two hours. Suddenly, the wind started to blow very hard. Our guide said a sand
was coming, so we had to move

to find a safe place. We hid behind a large rock until the wind stopped.

It was a long
, but finally, we saw a giant pyramid in the distance. It was amazing to think that people built it thousands of years ago. I took many photos to show my friends at school.

title_question.prompt: Now choose the best name for the story. Write a letter:

options.text: A cold day in the mountains

explanations_vi: Cảm thấy hơi sợ (scary) vì ngồi trên lưng lạc đà rất cao.
Đi băng qua bãi cát (sand) vàng suốt hai tiếng.
Hướng dẫn viên nói cơn bão (storm) cát đang đến.
Phải di chuyển thật nhanh (quickly) để tìm chỗ trú ẩn.
Đó là một chuyến hành trình (journey) dài nhưng cuối cùng thấy kim tự tháp.
Tiêu đề A (Một cuộc phiêu lưu dưới ánh mặt trời) phù hợp nhất: chuyến đi ở Ai Cập nóng bức với nhiều sự kiện thú vị.
